calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Asante Kiana Buckner appeared on her own behalf.
Jason Allen, Esq., appeared on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Uber Technologies, Inc.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Jason Allen, Esq testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Uber Technologies, Inc.
Plaintiff/Respondent Asante Kiana Buckner sworn and testified on her own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit A: Terms of Use
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit B: January 2021 Terms of Use

Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Gerardo Sandoval; Clerk: C. Balanga; Not reported. (608)
